query:
ALTER TABLE userSettings
  ADD COLUMN companyName VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN companyLogoUrl VARCHAR(500) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN hostingerApiKey VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN priceAlertsEnabled INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  ADD COLUMN namecheapAffiliateId VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN godaddyAffiliateId VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN porkbunAffiliateId VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN hostingerAffiliateId VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
